---
description: Implement work from the generated task plan.
---

Execute `.specify/specs/<feature-id>/tasks.md` in order and apply code/doc changes in this repository.

Execution rules:
1. Follow dependencies and complete tasks incrementally.
2. Keep edits minimal and aligned with the feature spec and constitution.
3. Run relevant validation steps from `plan.md`.
4. Update task checkboxes as work is completed.
5. Report any blockers with specific missing information.

If `tasks.md` is missing, request `/speckit.tasks` first.
